title: Origin Fairness, Politeness, Retries, Backoff, and p-limit
description: One global concurrency number bursts a single origin, retries synchronize, Retry-After is ignored, and p-limit is treated as a complete scheduler. Learners cumulatively produce publisher-respecting origin scheduler through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Maintain per-origin concurrency, minimum spacing, next-eligible time, request and byte budgets, and owner overrides.
Retry only classified transient and idempotent cases with attempt, elapsed, and owner budgets.
Parse valid Retry-After, combine it with capped exponential backoff and bounded jitter, and record the chosen delay.
